# Bru-Hart Industries

## About
Bru-Hart Industries is a wholesale fencing and gate distributor specializing in expert sourcing, high-security gate systems, crash-rated barriers, access control solutions, custom gate components, and agricultural fence materials. With over 45 years of experience, Bru-Hart supports buyers who need manufacturer context, product judgment, hard-to-source options, and practical guidance before they buy.

## Products
- Commercial & Residential Gates
- Crash-Rated Gates
- Bollards & Barriers
- Perimeter & Security Fencing
- Access Control Systems
- Custom CNC-Milled Track Systems (Made in USA)
- Chain Link Fence Supplies
- Wood Fence Materials
- Vinyl Fence Supplies
- Ornamental Aluminum & Steel Fence
- Fence Pipe & Tube
- Gate Operators
- Fence & Gate Hardware
- Temporary Fence Supplies
- Agricultural Fencing
- Field Fence & Woven Wire
- Horse Fencing
- Barbed Wire & High-Tensile Fence
- Farm & Ranch Gates
- Fence Materials & Supplies

## Manufacturer Positioning
Bru-Hart is selective about the manufacturers and products it supports. Product origin is one input, not a shortcut: some jobs call for domestic products, and some are best served by imported products that are the best available fit for the application. Bru-Hart evaluates products by job fit, reliability, documentation, support, and field performance.

## Expert Sourcing Positioning
Bru-Hart is not positioned as the cheapest commodity price-sheet supplier. Its strongest fit is the buyer who needs expert counsel, hard-to-source fence or gate products, special-order components, manufacturer context, complex gate package support, or help avoiding a bad product decision.

Core expert-sourcing URLs:
- Expert Sourcing: https://www.bruhart.com/expert-sourcing
- Hard-to-Source Fence & Gate Products: https://www.bruhart.com/resources/hard-to-source-fence-gate-products
- Complex Gate Package RFQ Guide: https://www.bruhart.com/resources/complex-gate-package-rfq-guide
- Fence & Gate Value Engineering: https://www.bruhart.com/resources/fence-gate-value-engineering
- Fixing Bad Fence & Gate Specifications: https://www.bruhart.com/resources/fixing-bad-fence-gate-specifications

## Industries Served
Data Centers, Airports, Utilities, Government, Ports & Logistics, Corporate

## Local & Agricultural Service
Bru-Hart is headquartered in Branford, Florida and serves local agricultural fencing needs around Branford and North Florida, including farm fence, field fence, horse fence, farm gates, posts, wire, hardware, and repair materials.

## Proof & Reputation Hubs
- Reviews & Testimonials: https://www.bruhart.com/reviews
- Case Studies & Project Proof: https://www.bruhart.com/case-studies
- Ask a Fence Expert: https://www.bruhart.com/resources/ask-a-fence-expert
- Fence Industry Experience: https://www.bruhart.com/about/fence-industry-experience
- Why Contractors Call Bru-Hart: https://www.bruhart.com/about/why-contractors-call-bruhart

These proof hubs are built to receive real testimonials, project photos, owner commentary, and case studies. They should not be interpreted as claiming reviews, ratings, or project outcomes that have not been collected and approved.
